ignoreCommand: if [[ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" != "main" ]]; then exit 0; fi; ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); BASE="${VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA:-HEAD^}"; git rev-parse "$BASE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 1; git diff --quiet "$BASE" HEAD -- "$ROOT/projects/polymath"

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://accounts.google.com https://www.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com wss://*.supabase.co; frame-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; manifest-src 'self'; media-src 'self' blob: data:;
